negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing revival pending-transaction dedup helper for AgentHeartbeat reviveAgentPrepared(address,bytes) with padded address validation. The active-job helper does pass the synthesized tx hash and building block to job_exists_and_active, but the revival dedup half was not found.
related_but_insufficient_code: decide_active_job_augmentation(tx_hash, building_block_number, ...) dispatches exactly those two values to the predicate.
synthesize_heartbeat_revival_transactions skips owners with pending active jobs, but no reviveAgentPrepared pending-tx calldata matcher was found.

rationale: These two candidates are current scheduler-adjacent guards but do not participate in the startup hydration lineage; keeping them distinct preserves their narrower semantics.
statement: Revival deduplication only recognizes pending AgentHeartbeat reviveAgentPrepared(address,bytes) transactions with correctly padded address arguments, and active-job augmentation must pass the exact synthesized transaction hash and building block to its active-job predicate.
suggested_falsification_tests: Place pending heartbeat reviveAgentPrepared transactions with valid and malformed padding and assert only correctly padded matches deduplicate revival synthesis.
Assert active-job predicate receives exact synthesized tx hash and building block number.
summary: Active-job guard exists, but revival pending-tx dedup is absent.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Active-job helper can be unit-tested today; revival pending-tx dedup helper is absent.
title: Revival and active-job helper guards remain independent
